title: Announcements

Announcements

Erasmus+

Announcements

About the Erasmus+ Student Learning Mobility Language Test (Project No 2025-1-TR01-KA131-HED-00031955)

17
						November

2025

The Erasmus Language Exam will be held between 2–4 December 2025.

️4 December 2025 – Speaking Exam (only for candidates who pass the written exam)

All exams will be conducted face-to-face.

Further details and updates will be shared on the Istanbul Okan University Erasmus website.

Good luck to all candidates!
